programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Claude Dallas vivía la vida de un vaquero. Un solitario y desconfiado de la autoridad, vivía de la tierra, practicando la caza furtiva y vendiendo pieles.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Comenzando en California en 1995, un asesino en serie atacó a varias mujeres vulnerables. Al principio, se mostraba encantador y generoso, y con rapidez se tornaba violento. Era despiadado en sus crímenes y rápido en sus escapes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1990 y 1991, la policía de Chicago y el FBI estaban tras el rastro de un ladrón de bancos cuyos asaltos se estaban tornando cada vez más violentos.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre tiene un episodio de taquicardia y requiere asistencia médica. Una infractora parece no captar la gravedad de su situación. Son 2 contra uno cuando la policía cuestiona a un trío interesante.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Las cosas empeoran para un conductor cuando su pasajero habla. Una mujer angustiada entrega a su prometido abusivo. Los oficiales no saben que pensar cuando detienen a un hombre muy amable.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un joven acusado hace todo lo que puede para escapar de la cárcel. Un abuelo salva el día cuando la mamá falla. En un retén un policía sospecha de un par de ancianos por actividad criminal.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Una mujer que estaba dormida recibe a los agentes con mal humor. La policía responde a informes de un sospechoso y descubre mucho más. Una joven intenta evadir la cárcel haciendo promesas.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un adolescente huye después de ser llevado al médico. Durante una parada un sospechoso hace todo lo posible para guardar silencio. Una tía enojada no puede desalojar al sobrino y novia embarazada.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un motociclista casi se mata después de estrellarse en una carretera oscura. En una parada, la policía pide información a los pasajeros. Un conductor joven admite que su situación no es favorable cuando la policía lo detiene.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un incendio en la cocina crece por toda la casa y atrapa a un hombre en el último piso. Un fugitivo finge tener calma pero sus nervios lo delatan. Un sospechoso pide que los agentes no sean duros con él.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: La policía hace un análisis forense cuando dos sospechosos niegan la evidencia de cigarrillos. La cena se arruina cuando un compañero lanza puñetazos. Un hombre sostiene que le están tendiendo una trampa.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: En una escena del crimen, cualquier cosa que quedó atrás o está fuera de lugar se considera una pista.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: A veces, la balanza de la justicia es equilibrada por unos pocos miligramos de evidencia: un par de fibras, un relleno dental o una mancha en un trozo de cinta. Los casos más grandes a menudo se resuelven con las pistas más pequeñas.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Ocultar un cuerpo puede ser difícil. A veces, es más fácil esconder o disfrazar las circunstancias de la muerte, convertir el asesinato en suicidio o culpar a otra persona. La verdad sale a la luz a través de pistas sutiles tomadas de la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Algunas personas se salen con la suya, al menos por un tiempo. Seguros de su éxito, los asesinos en serie matan una y otra vez. Pero cada vez que lo hacen, dejan algunas pistas más y, en última instancia, ellas los llevan a la ruina.

programme.title: Louis Armstrong: 100th Anniversary
programme.desc: Louis Armstrong dazzled millions of fans with his virtuoso trumpet playing and his irresistible vocal style. Celebrate his life as past performances are revisited and first hand accounts of his life are given by individuals touched by him.

programme.title: Johnny Mathis: In Concert
programme.desc: Johnny Mathis is one of a handful of artists who truly deserves a legendary status. Since his impact on scene in the 1950s, Johnny has maintained a high levels of performance, both on recordings and on stage.

programme.title: Whitney Houston: We Will Always Love You
programme.desc: In this film we pay tribute to one of the worlds most loved and best selling music artists of all time. Whitney Elizabeth Houston first showed the vocal range and star quality at the tender age of 11.

programme.title: B.B. King - Life Of Riley
programme.desc: Narrated by Morgan Freeman, this visually stunning film has an contributions by Bono, Eric Clapton, Bruce Willis, Bonnie Raitt, Dr. John and Keith Richards, as well as appearances by Mick Jagger and President Obama.

programme.title: The Story of James Brown
programme.desc: James Brown is one of the founders of funk music and is a major figure of 20th century music and dance. This program features interviews with the man himself, live performances, interviews with band members Bobby Byrd and Maceo Parker Jr.

programme.title: The Story of Jay-Z
programme.desc: Jay-Z is one of the most talented, successful and acclaimed musicians of all time. He changed the game and without him, music - and more specifically hip hop - would not be in the medium it is today.

programme.title: Chuck Berry - The Original King Of Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: CHUCK BERRY' tells the story of the Granddaddy of Rock & Roll. In this highly- anticipated OFFICIAL and Fully-Authorized feature documentary, the absolute instigator of Rock and Roll, Chuck Berry is truly revealed.

programme.title: Darryl Jones: In The Blood
programme.desc: Follows the evolution of Jones, who grew up on the South Side of Chicago.

programme.desc: Jonathan comes clean about his substance abuse, Jaquae finally denies Safaree's allegations, and Juju urges Kimbella to lean on Yandy after Juelz accepts a plea deal.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Joe and Cyn reach a crossroads in their relationship, Rich Dollaz seeks a favor from Nya Lee, and Juelz has a difficult conversation with his kids about his legal situation.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Safaree's business venture raises eyebrows, Cyn and Joe struggle with her postpartum depression, Yandy's good deed could lead to big trouble, and Sidney Starr needs direction.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: A revelation from Cyn's childhood rocks her relationship with Joe, Sidney Starr shows up for Nya Lee, Yandy digs into Infinity's past, and Rich Dollaz steps up as a father.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Nya Lee goes to war with Sidney Starr and Mariahlynn, Alexis faces a near-death experience, and Rich supports Miracle as she faces her day in court.

programme.desc: Maino and Maggie butt heads over her music career, Alexis Skyy tries to move forward without her label, and Sidney Starr has a consultation for gender reassignment surgery.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Juju plans a trip with the girls to Costa Rica, Alexis Skyy faces rumors that Solo Lucci is her daughter's father, and Remy and Papoose go all out for their baby shower.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Juju's girls' trip to Costa Rica takes an unexpected turn, Joe feels pressure to propose to Cyn in paradise, and Miracle's trial weighs heavily on Rich Dollaz's family.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Juju sets the record straight about her relationship with Safaree, Joe is furious when an uninvited guest arrives, and Kimbella and Yandy remain at odds with each other.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: The Costa Rica trip ends with a confrontation between Joe and Safaree, Juelz and Kim rush to get married before he reports to prison, and two proposals make waves.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Chrissy Lampkin comes home to Jim Jones after an eight year absence. Safaree and Erica Mena are back to plan their wedding. Cyn Santana and Joe Budden finally speak. Remy Ma's Off Parole party takes a turn when an unexpected guest arrives.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Yandy drops explosive news about Chrissy and Jim, sending Kimbella on the warpath. Erica Mena considers a move that threatens her wedding plans. Remy Ma gets tough love from Fat Joe. And Tahiry finds herself in a matchmaking plan with Joe Budden.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Chrissy takes Kimbella and Juju to Philly to try and save her real estate business. Erica Mena and Safaree face a painful decision. Rich Dollaz is ready to work with up and coming rapper Jennaske. And a perfume release is anything but sweet.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Yandy pitches her business plan to the Mayor of Newark. Joe Budden and Tahiry explore a new relationship. Newcomer Jennaske pits Rich Dollaz against Phresher. Erica Mena discovers a text that jeopardizes her wedding. And Chrissy confronts Yandy.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: On the first day of spring in Australia, creatures look for either dinner or a date, ranging from kangaroos in the grasslands to koalas in the trees and freshwater crocodiles.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Tide
programme.desc: Diving into the alien world that emerges whenever the tide goes out; encounter curious creatures that have evolved to endure this zone's extreme conditions, including an air-breathing fish and a predator that turns itself inside out to eat.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Exploring the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean's most peculiar creatures; learning how bloody battles for mates, gender bending, and super-size litters of babies might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve returns home to the Atlantic waters of the British Isles as he considers the question of what humanity can do to ensure the enduring future of whales.

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Tag along with Lizzie on her most dangerous Atlantic adventure yet; free diving with bull sharks; explore otherworldly Gulf Coast swamps filled with hungry alligators, crafty snapping turtles and tiny but mighty beach mice who strengthen sand dunes.

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow disappearance of sea ice; she does time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: Coastal Africa
programme.desc: The marine life living in an expanse of kelp along Africa's southwestern shore.

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Embark on a journey as Lizzie traverses air, land and sea to encounter Alaskan wildlife and explore some of the world's most remote corners; join scientists eavesdropping on underwater Arctic residents.

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Trekking through the Canadian rainforest, looking up at dizzying redwood trees and exploring giant kelp forests with Lizzie as she experiences the wild West Coast of North America; crossing paths with wolves and bears while salmon travel upstream.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Getting acquainted with an array of ocean oddballs and learning how billions of years' worth of changes have shaped their looks and skills; meeting blind worms who fish, walking sharks, tree-climbing crabs and much more.

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: Rare penguins are locked in a daily game of cat and mouse with giant New Zealand sea lions; the sea lions also live in a tumultuous world, where pups must battle the elements to survive.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Discover how scientists are working to restore and protect the Galapagos; witness penguin health checks, tortoise tagging and battles against invasive species, which are building a sustainable future for this delicate, one-of-a-kind ecosystem.

programme.title: Lionfish: The New Pirates of the Caribbean
programme.desc: Exploring the lion fish, introduced in the 1990s, posing a threat to native species.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Tide

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats finally discover the culprit behind their memory loss, but they’ve got bigger problems. The mysterious thief is determined to pit Zoro and Luffy against each other!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Luffy fight to the death, Nami attempts to orchestrate an uprising, and Sanji discovers he’s willing to kick a kid in order to get his memories back!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats finally regain their memories, but a much larger challenge looms on the horizon. The mysterious thief is about to transform into something even more powerful!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A terrible storm leads to another run in with the devious Captain Foxy! When Luffy makes the dangerous decision to help his old foe, it could spell disaster for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates must survive another outrageous battle aboard Captain Foxy’s booby-trapped boat, and even if they survive, something far worse awaits them!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats take time out to help a group of hungry castaways, but trouble looms on the horizon. An icy marine adversary is out to track down Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Usopp work feverishly to save Robin from her icy tomb, and Luffy looks to settle the score with Admiral Aokiji in a man-to-man fight to the finish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An encounter with a giant swimming frog leads to a close call with a seafaring train! Next up for the Straw Hats: drop anchor at a town full of water and seek out a shipwright!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Usopp, and Nami take a wild ride through Water Seven in search of a shipwright. Meanwhile, Chopper and Robin get separated during their quest to find a bookstore!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is attacked by thugs who want to cash in on his bounty, Sanji gets lost on a grocery shopping expedition, and three suitcases full of cash mysteriously go missing!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A carpenter and his talking pigeon help recover the Straw Hats’ missing money, but the Franky Family won’t give up so easily. Luffy and Nami receive very bad news about their beloved boat!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Nami refuse to believe that the Going Merry’s seaworthy days are finished, but for now, bigger problems loom on the horizon! Their money is missing again, along with Usopp!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp bravely tries to recover the stolen money, but the Franky Family has him badly outnumbered. Zoro, Sanji, and Chopper set out on a rescue mission, but they’ll need Luffy to even the odds!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp regains consciousness after his vicious beating, but he’s not at all happy to hear Luffy’s plans for the Going Merry. Temper flares and challenges are issued as the Straw Hats face their most uncertain hour.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Usopp battle to a brutal standstill in a heartbreaking duel between men who once called each other family. Can the Straw Hats find the strength to carry on without their sniper?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hat split is overshadowed by an assassination attempt on the mayor of Water Seven! Luffy is eager to investigate, but the leader of the Franky Family is about to reappear!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s grudge match with Franky gets serious when his opponent turns out to be a cyborg! Iceberg awakes from his slumber only to hurl heinous accusations at the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is branded an assassin and attacked by Iceberg’s strongest men! Meanwhile, Sanji and Chopper attempt to warn Usopp about an impending natural disaster!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The citizens of Water Seven search for the Straw Hats and a devastating storm threatens to sink the city. Chopper and Sanji pick up Robin’s trail, but they aren’t prepared for what they’ll find.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp prepares to ride out the storm aboard the Going Merry, Franky hatches a plan to force Luffy into a rematch, and the Straw Hats set out to uncover Robin’s dark secret.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin and her CP9 brethren seek to settle unfinished business with Iceberg. The Straw Hats have a plan to clear their names, but the assassins are one step ahead of them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes his long-awaited entrance, Iceberg has a shocking surprise in store for Robin, and the true identities of the masked assassins of CP9 are finally revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: CP9 listens to Iceberg’s blood to learn the location of the blueprints, Usopp has another run-in with Franky and the remaining Straw Hats – plus a new friend – race to the rescue!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the gang come face to face with Robin and her CP9 comrades. The rubberman is prepared to fight for his friend, but he’s never faced foes like this!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami are sent hurtling toward their deaths by the villains of CP9! Meanwhile, Usopp forges an unlikely friendship with Franky while waiting out a storm.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky tries to convince Usopp that there’s no hope for the Going Merry, but the sniper – inspired by a mysterious moment from the past – remains loyal to his beloved boat

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A look back at Franky’s past reveals the amazing origins of the sea train – and paints a vivid picture of his younger days, spent alongside Iceberg and the legendary shipwright Tom!

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a prominent Santa Rosa, Calif., couple is found gunned down at the offices of one of the world's most popular cartoons, detectives are left to untangle the inner workings of a decades-long marriage.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A picture-perfect Navy family is shattered when the father is found shot to death after returning home from deployment; detectives are led to believe the crime is a tragic coincidence until a dark plan devised from lust and greed comes to light.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a father in Spokane, Wash., is found shot to death in his vehicle, detectives work for years to unmask a vicious killer who isn't afraid to silence witnesses; they eventually uncover a long-kept family secret that breaks the case wide open.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After an Air Force recruiter is found dead in a ditch near his Ohio home, authorities chase down several leads until the case culminates with a sting operation worthy of an international spy drama.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After gunshots ring out in rural New Jersey, police discover a beloved father shot to death and a vehicle taken from the premises; investigators must determine if this is a random act of violence or a murder plot spun from an ongoing dispute.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a local antique shop owner is murdered in a seemingly random home invasion, North Carolina police discover there is more to the story when a web of lies and infidelity are revealed.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A retired nuclear physicist is reported missing and investigators discover he lived a reclusive life fueled by paranoia, but as detectives race to find him, they begin to wonder whether his fears were unfounded or if his worst nightmare came true.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A general store owner in Rusk, Texas, calls 911 and makes a harrowing confession, but as detectives dig deeper, they discover a disturbing pattern making them rethink the motivation behind the crime.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: An early morning apartment fire in Fort Worth, Texas, sparks a murder investigation when a young woman's body is found beaten and bound inside; detectives quickly work to solve the case and uncover an elaborate plot fueled by revenge and greed.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a mother and son are brutally attacked during a home invasion, Illinois police chase down several leads; they uncover a shocking motive with an occult leader and her loyal followers at the center of the crime.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a beloved mother goes missing on her birthday, detectives are faced with several possible suspects before focusing on a co-worker with a shocking past who will do anything to hide their true identity.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a small-town man is found shot to death at a Missouri roadside park, the evidence trail leads detectives further into the man's complicated past where they uncover a wicked plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Police follow a lead in a missing persons investigation to a 115-acre farm, unearthing the site of a gruesome crime and a seductive killer that will go down in New Hampshire history.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A loving father agrees to give his ex-wife a chance to reconcile; when his loved ones can't reach him, an unexpected tip is brought to Oklahoma police that uncovers a toxic love triangle and horrific crime scene.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a beloved family man dies in a house fire, his wife and children must grapple with his unexpected loss.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a professional basketball star is gunned down in his hometown of Memphis, Tenn., the case goes cold for nearly a decade; after a new team of investigators takes over, it uncovers the missing murder weapon and a mastermind close to home court.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A 62-year-old man bails his stepdaughter out of jail for attempted murder and is soon found dead, but investigators learn his death may not be what it seems.

programme.desc: Kira is forced to appear before Koichi after his remote Heart Attack bomb is made useless by the boy’s new Stand, Reverb Act 3. Finally coming face-to-face with the serial killer, Koichi attacks him with Act 3.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Father
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends are at Yoshikage Kira’s home trying to find any clues that may lead them to the serial killer, who has gone into hiding under a new face and identity.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Janken Boy Is Coming!
programme.desc: Kira’s father, Yoshihiro, begins searching for Stand users who would help protect his son from his pursuers. Meanwhile, Rohan is taking photos at the train station when he is suddenly challenged to a game of rock-paper-scissors.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: I'm an Alien
programme.desc: While on their way to school, Josuke and Okuyasu find a young man lying unconscious in the middle of what appears to be a crop circle. When they try to take a closer look, the man suddenly wakes up and starts claiming he’s an alien from outer space.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Highway Go Go, Part 1
programme.desc: Rohan is convinced that Josuke is cheating in their game of Cee-lo when all the dice rolls in his opponent’s favor. Feeling insulted, Rohan stabs his own finger and swear he’ll find out how Josuke is cheating in their next round.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Highway Go Go, Part 2
programme.desc: Rohan sacrifices himself to save Josuke from a remote-controlled Stand that sucks nutrients out of its victims. Moved by Rohan’s act of bravery, Josuke races through town to find and defeat the Stand’s user before it can kill Rohan.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Cats Love Yoshikage Kira
programme.desc: Shinobu tells her husband, Kosaku, that she saw a stray cat in their basement with a hole in its throat. When Kosaku goes down to take a look, he finds the cat already dead, The next morning, a strange plant sprouts from the spot where the cat was buried.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 1
programme.desc: Yoshihiro Kira spots Kosaku Kawajiri and instantly recognizes that it’s actually his son, Yoshikage. Meanwhile, Josuke, Okuyasu, and Mikitaka find a strange man living in an abandoned electrical tower.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke enters the electrical tower again to save Mikitaka and defeat Toyohiro Kanedaichi. Meanwhile, Rohan receives a visit from a first-class architect named Masazo Kinoto, who’s come to estimate the repair costs to his burnt house.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 3
programme.desc: Rohan finds himself possessed by Masazo Kinoto’s Stand, Cheap Trap, who tells the manga artist to burn the photos he took of the people in Morioh. Meanwhile, Josuke and Yuya encounter the Stand user responsible for Koichi’s disappearance.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 4
programme.desc: Rohan calls over Koichi to help him fight off Cheap Trap, which has attached itself onto Rohan’s back. Unfortunately, Koichi thinks Rohan is pulling a prank on him and leaves.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bites the Dust, Part 1
programme.desc: Kosaku Kawajiri is forced to kill Hayato after the boy threatens to expose him as a killer. To make matter worse, Kosaku learns from his father, Yoshihiro, that Rohan and the others are coming to investigate the Kawajiri family shortly.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bites the Dust, Part 2
programme.desc: Yoshikage Kira gains a new ability called Bites the Dust, a bomb that automatically kills anyone who tries to discover Kira’s identity through Hayato. Realizing that the only people who could stop Kira are ones with similar powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shining D (Diamond) is Unbreakable, Part 1
programme.desc: Hayato’s attempt to kill Kira using Stray Cat’s air bullet ends in failure. Kira realizes that letting Hayato repeat the same morning is becoming a risk, so he decides to undo Bites the Dust after he sees through Rohan’s death.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shining D (Diamond) is Unbreakable, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke and Hayato hide inside a nearby residence to escape from Deadly Queen and Stray Cat’s attack. But to their horror, Kira is somehow able to close in on them from outside the house.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Goodbye, Morioh – The Heart of Gold
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends have finally cornered Yoshikage Kira. Refusing to give up, Kira tries to activate Bites the Dust one more time to escape his desperate situation. Can Josuke and the others stop Kira in time to save the future of Morioh?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Wind

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The expedition attempts a 100 mile open water crossing in the Bering Sea. Charles nears hypothermia. Fall approaches and the and the men fear they may never reach the Bering Strait.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Steven uses every resource available to get the expedition to Nome Alaska. Steven develops a high fever and the team goes to work without their leader. The men see Herds of Caribou along the shore and end up camping on the edge of the world.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: It’s a quiet morning as the expedition face their final day and attempt to cross the Bering Strait. The men try to get fuel from the small native village of Wales. The seas turn huge and the men face their worst fears.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The men return to the Bering Strait nine months after their first failed attempt to cross into Russian waters. Excitement builds but the weather will not cooperate so the men take refuge in the small native settlement of Wales and wait for their window.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: After a successful crossing of the Bering Strait the men have been taken into custody at gunpoint by the Russian Military. Word of the teams detainment goes viral as television networks all over the world report on the incident.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The expedition has been forced to cross back across the Bering Strait to the United States and Steven tries to convince the men to re-route and head through the Northwest Passage.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The men free themselves from the lagoon but Andrews attitude begins to effect the team. North bound the men push above the Arctic Circle and are forced to overnight in Kotzebue. Steven puts Andrew on notice.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: In route to Barrow the team get stuck in a maze of Arctic Ice. Steven is forced to send one of the crew home while the men prepare to push into the Beaufort Sea.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Scrambling to prepare leaving Barrow the men sell the extra watercraft for additional fuel money. The team experience the worst ocean conditions in two seasons and get stranded at an abandoned DEW line site.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Completely out of fuel the team is stuck waiting for the weather to clear and a plane to resupply the expedition. The men hunt for caribou and cook fresh meat on an open fire.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Camping on the edge of Prudhoe Bay the team must face the financial realities of the expedition. Prices for fuel continue to rise as the expedition arrive at the last village in the United States, Kaktovik.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The men fear they may have to turn back unless they can find local help with getting fuel out to the Canadian border. With an Arctic storm bearing down on the village the expedition push boldly ahead into the unknown.

programme.desc: El audaz intento de Faruk por atrapar a Adem se vuelve en su contra, dejando a Süreyya profundamente perturbada.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash y sus amigos encuentran una maravillosa isla repleta de muchos tipos de árboles frutales, deciden tomarse un descanso y disfrutar su botín. Claro que el Equipo Rocket tiene otra idea…

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a un par de Entrenadores que no parecen llevarse nada bien, aunque sus Nidoran están obviamente encantados uno con el otro. ¡Misty está decidida a resolver este desafío romántico!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras caminar bajo una tormenta eléctrica, nuestros héroes encuentran a un grupo de Magnemite absorbiendo electricidad de los rayos. Cuando llegan al pueblo para descansar, hay un apagón. ¿Podrán ayudarlos los Magnemite?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: En Ciudad Trovitopolis, Ash y sus amigos escuchan sobre una cierta clase de monstruo que ha estado asustando a todos, y cuando el suelo se resquebraja y los lanza a las cloacas, parece que conocerán al monstruo cara a cara.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Luego de que Misty bucea hacia un remolino para rescatar a una chica, descubre que el hermano de esta, Rudy, está enamorado de ella. Las cosas se complican pues él también es el Líder de Gimnasio al que Ash retará después.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos van en busca de un Pokémon de gran tamaño, pero cuando caen ante un truco del Equipo Rocket, y luego Pikachu y Meowth son secuestrados por un Pidgeot gigante, ¡todos deben trabajar juntos para recuperarlos!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Luego de escuchar hablar de Ash por el Líder de Gimnasio de Isla Trovita, otro Entrenador lo busca para una batalla… y, tras ver derrotado a Pïkachu, Ash utiliza a Charizard. Pero ¿logrará que el Pokémon rebelde lo escuche?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Los planes de nuestros héroes se ven interrumpidos por un incendio devastador en una casa cercana. Cuando intentan combatir las llamas, pronto requieren al departamento de bomberos local: ¡el Equipo Wartortle!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando la Pokébola de Snorlax se rompe, Ash tiene un gran problema en sus manos, ¿cómo lograrán nuestros héroes que el somnoliento Snorlax sobre una montaña llegue al Centro Pokémon más cercano?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash está ansioso por ganar la última medalla de la Liga Naranja, ¡y pronto prueba un poco de la fuerza de esta Líder de Gimnasio cuando ella le ayuda a eludir otro sigiloso ataque del Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras descubrir el submarino de un científico, los chicos se ven rodeados de la investigación de sus vidas: un banco de Magikarp. Quieren ayudarlo a estudiar la evolución de los Magikarp, pero el Equipo Rocket tiene otra idea.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Con Ash y Tracey paralizados por el Paralizador de un Vileplume salvaje, ¡depende de Misty encontrar una planta local y salvar a todos!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Con sus cuatro medallas de la Liga Naranja en la mano, Ash tiene un último desafío por enfrentar antes de ser coronado como Campeón de la Liga Naranja. ¿Tendrá lo que se necesita?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: La batalla de Ash por el Trofeo del Ganador de la Liga Naranja continúa, ¡y pronto será evidente que tendrá que enfrentarse a un poderoso Dragonite para convertirse en el Campeón de la Liga Naranja!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tratando de rescatar a un banco local de Lapras de posibles cazadores, nuestros héroes deben hallar una forma de convencer a estos desconfiados Pokémon de que son amigos… ¡antes de que sea demasiado tarde!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Con Pueblo Paleta en sus mentes, los chicos buscan un ferry, pero el puerto está abandonado... ¡excepto por unos Electrode explosivos! ¿Podrá Ash detener al Equipo Rocket antes de que el transbordador se llene de humo?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash tiene un ajetreado regreso a casa con una sorpresiva visita de un viejo amigo, una visita para ver al Profesor Oak, y un ataque del Equipo Rocket. ¡No hay lugar como el hogar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto

programme.desc: To save Janeway and the rest of Voyager's crew, Chakotay must convince her that her seemingly happy life as a worker on Quarra is not real.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven's attempt to explore her human side distracts her from her duties and puts Voyager at risk.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Q's unruly and omnipotent son wreaks interstellar havoc when he is left in Janeway's care.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor publishes a holo-novel based on his Voyager experiences which scandalizes the crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager recovers a long-lost space probe which has caused terrible radiation damage on a distant planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven and Chakotay stumble upon a race of primitive humanoids isolated from technological progress by an energy barrier.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix is faced with the decision of a lifetime when Voyager locates a tribe of exiled Talaxians on a distant asteroid.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway is held hostage by aliens who force the Doctor to help them steal Voyager's warp core.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager's quest to return home is aided by a visitor from the future – Admiral Kathryn Janeway.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Puzzled over the hive ship's sudden departure, the team picks up a weak subspace signal in Wraith code. Once deciphered, their worst fears are realized. The Wraith message contains a familiar set of coordinates. The hive ship is on its way to Earth!

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Col. Telford reveals the Destiny is in imminent danger of being boarded by the Lucian Alliance, they launch an attack on the Lucian Alliance’s secret base. Meanwhile, the Lucian Alliance forces Dr. Rush to help stage an assault on the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: The Destiny crew must fight for their lives when members of the Lucian Alliance come through the Stargate, hell-bent on taking the ship by force. Meanwhile, the Destiny starts having ship-wide power blackouts caused by deadly bursts of radiation.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After Colonel Young and his military personnel are captured by the Lucian Alliance, Dannic abandons them on a nearby planet. Meanwhile on the ship, Dr. Rush, Brody, Chloe, and Eli attempt a risky plan to force the Lucians to surrender.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the need for food and water becoming dire, Dr. Rush manages to find a planet within range that seems viable but can only be accessed by shuttle. When nearing the planet, they encounter violent turbulence and must make a dangerous crash landing.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A truce is declared among the Goa'uld, so that the warlords can attend a summit on the future of universe domination. As Jackson speaks fluent Goa'uld, he is sent to the summit disguised as an aide. But his real mission is to poison the delegates!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Embattled and under siege, SG-1 attempts to escape a Goa'uld search and destroy mission bent on finding them and the secret crystal they carry. Meanwhile, the balance of life is threatened by the reappearance of the evil System Lord Anubis.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As an asteroid hurtles toward Earth, SG-1 uses an abandoned Goa'uld ship as a launch pad for a mega-bomb designed to destroy the rock before impact. But when SGC loses the ship's signal, it's feared that the team is dead and that Earth is in peril.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: K'tano, former First Prime of the late Imhotep, is now the leader of a powerful Jaffa rebellion. SG-1 visits his stronghold in hopes of securing an alliance. But O'Neill soon learns that this strategic partnership may well come at a heavy price.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A dormant female android discovered on a barren planet is transported back to Earth for study. On reactivation, she exhibits a childlike innocence. But soon, SG-1 discovers that this seemingly innocent being may hold a dangerous secret.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Col. O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) must enlist the aid of a couple of convicted felons in a bid to save a planet from the Goa'uld. With an attack looming, an entire world's salvation rests in the hands of SG-1 and two former NID operatives.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Exposed to a lethal dose of radiation, Jackson has just hours to live. SG-1 tries everything in its power to save him, but as the hours tick away, Jackson's spirit meets with each member individually to discuss his next mission: life after death.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Still dealing with the death of one of their own, SG-1 must put its mourning aside in order to confront the warlord Anubis—who has captured the Asgard leader Thor so he can extract the secrets of their ancient technology for universal domination.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team faces two potential disasters light years apart as an energy build-up in the Stargate threatens to destroy Earth, and Teal'c (Christopher Judge) returns home to find his wife dead, his son estranged and his planet under attack.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Al Capone outwits Eliot Ness, but Capone's criminal empire remains in jeopardy when the IRS plants an undercover agent in his gang.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: With Capone in jail, Frank Nitti, Paul Ricca, and Joe Accardo take over. A Hollywood scandal presents Sam Giancana with a chance to prove himself.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo sets his sights on Las Vegas, but when Sam Giancana incurs the wrath of young attorney Robert F. Kennedy, The Outfit is threatened.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo and Sam Giancana have a falling out, and the fate of the Outfit rests on the outcome. Joe Accardo cleans up loose ends before retiring.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny, Bajie, and Gaius seek an unlikely ally in the fight against Pilgrim. Cressida has a disturbing revelation. The Widow questions her future.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny, The Widow and Bajie lead the charge against Pilgrim, as he attempts to gain ultimate control of the Badlands. M.K. seeks revenge on The Widow.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: The Badlands' deadliest Clipper, Sunny, rescues a mysterious boy, M.K., who harbors a dark secret, but may also know the way out of the Badlands.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: M.K. finds refuge in an unlikely and dangerous place, while Sunny's loyalty is tested when Quinn tries to force him to commit an unspeakable act.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Left reeling by the launch of a rival, Mutiny takes measures to ensure its survival. Attempting to quell his paranoia, Gordon pays a price.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Gordon aids Joe as the Clark family descends into crisis. Cameron envisions a new future for Mutiny that may not include everyone.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Gordon and Cameron struggle to make Joe's vision a reality while Joe and Bosworth attempt to procure capital to fund the making of the new machine.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: As Cameron nears completion of the BIOS, a crisis threatens the project's future and requires all hands on deck to save the machine.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the rainbow fountain stops working, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Plumber and fixes the fountain so that everyone can cool off. // Getting ready for her royal party, Kiki turns purple when she accidentally picks Plumenberries instead of Rainbow Berries.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When young Jessy is afraid of going to the hair salon, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Hairdresser to show Jessy just how fun a visit to the salon can be. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a Dentist to help Jessy with a painful new tooth.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a babysitter to help babysit Jessy who, because of eating a magic bean, has grown into a giant baby! // Rainbow Ruby becomes a choreographer to help Thunderbell apologize to his friend, Mr. Sloth, in a truly musical way.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Kiki's crown loses a jewel, Rainbow Ruby becomes an Archaeologist and follows a map to an ancient treasure. // It's New Year's in Rainbow Village and everyone has gathered for the special dumpling feast.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki's is upset when her garden is a mess. Ruby becomes a gardener and makes the garden lovely. // Mysterious gifts are being left for people across Rainbow Village. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Detective to work out who or what is leaving the gifts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the Rainbow Village train won't stop running on the track, Rainbow Ruby becomes a firefighter to bring the train to a stop. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a fashion designer and makes fantastically fruity outfits to save the day.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a lifeguard to help Ling Ling learn how to swim! //Thunderbell cannot find his beloved pet fish, so Rainbow Ruby becomes a detective to help solve the mystery and learns that the fish was actually a tadpole who is turning into a frog.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a party planner and holds a party that satisfies both Prince Frederick and Princess Kiki. // When the poppies make a mess in Rainbow Village's town square, Rainbow Ruby becomes a clean-up engineer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Something is wrong with Kiki's beloved pomeranian on the day of the Rainbow Village Flower Festival, and Rainbow Ruby becomes a veterinarian to save the pup! // Rainbow Ruby becomes a marine biologist to help an injured baby dolphin return home.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Chirpee's bird friends come for a visit and want to perch on people's heads. // Prince Frederick comes to observe rainbow fish in the lake, only to discover that the water is frozen, and the fish are gone for the season.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The moon is gone, and the villagers can't sleep without his friendly “goodnight, sweet dreams!” // When Thunderbell adds too much bubble bath to his tub, he is trapped in a giant soap bubble.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby becomes an architect to help redesign Felicia's house after it accidentally gets destroyed by Gina. // Gina brings a machine to make rainbow sorbet for everyone.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Thunderbell discovers an unknown, delicious fruit, he eats up all of it at once. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When three little stars run away to Rainbow Village, Rainbow Ruby becomes an astronaut to return them safely to space. // When Kiki breaks a gem given to her by Prince Frederick, she doesn't get a chance to see its special sparkle.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: During a camping trip in the forest, the Rainbow Village friends see a “monster” and almost cancel the trip. // When Princess Kiki chips her leg before a ballet performance, Rainbow Ruby must take the stage to save the day!

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell's scooter breaks, and he must deliver packages on foot, which is slow and painful. // When Ling Ling's group portrait gift is ruined, Rainbow Ruby secretly takes photos and surprises him with a photo album of all of their friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the restaurant is overrun with customers who aren't being served properly, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Waitress. // When Ruby's spilled marbles pour down on Rainbow Village, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Paramedic to treat the wounded.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Jessy's upset because everyone forgot the anniversary of the day she arrived in Rainbow Village. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Chef to cheer her up. // When Ling Ling's cold won't go away, Doctor Ruby discovers his problem is really allergies.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When nobody can understand what roles actors are playing in a performance, Rainbow Ruby designs costumes for the cast! // When Paige gets swept up on a windy day, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Firefighter to bring her to safety.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a Singer and puts on a concert that cheers everyone up! // When Thunderbell forgets to mail invitations to his secret-swap-present party, Rainbow Ruby devises a plan to deliver them just in time.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the field is covered in pokey pods before a rainbow ball tournament, Rainbow Ruby creates a golf game to whack the pods out of the field. // When things go missing in Rainbow Village, it's up to Detective Rainbow Ruby and Choco to find the culprit.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a Pilot to help Chirpee see what it's like to fly, like other birds. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a Fashion Designer and finds the perfect solution to Paige's fashion catastrophe.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: To help Ellie overcome her stage fright, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Dance Teacher to help her friend take part in a dance-a-thon. // When the new fairy won't stop playing a game of hide-and-seek, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Baker to draw her out with the aroma.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the rainbow friends try to make a movie starring Princess Kiki, they discover they need Rainbow Ruby to pull everything together and make it happen. // Rainbow Ruby realizes trying to get 3 tots back to sleep can be both frustrating and fun.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki falls under a sleeping enchantment and needs a moving music box to cure her. // There's an epic traffic jam in Rainbow Village until Police Officer Rainbow Ruby arrives to help.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The Rainbow Village Annual Noodle Festival is in trouble. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Chef and makes noodles to save the day. // Ruby goes to Rainbow Village to help Gina get her confidence back by making her a star in the circus.

programme.desc: Las Elizondo les explican a los Reyes que se quedan en la hacienda ante el peligro que se cierne sobre Gabriela. Fernando contrata como mayordomos a dos antiguos enemigos de los Reyes.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La venganza y el odio llevan a los hermanos del Monte a enfrentarse entre ellos, cuando José intenta sacar del medio a Paula y a su madre a empujones. No saben que Juan saldrá en su defensa. Efraín descubre el romance a sus espaldas.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José asume su responsabilidad de padre al rescatar a su hijo cuando Efraín intenta llevárselo por celos y rabia, mientras Paula y Julieta se enfrentan de nuevo. Juan le dice a Paula que está decidido a casarse y que cumplirá con irse de la casa.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José no quiere compromisos con Beatriz y cuando ella guarda la esperanza de una nueva vida al lado del hombre que ama, él la pone en su lugar. Julieta le propone a Juan vivir con sus padres mientras terminan de construir la casa donde vivirán.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucas siente miedo y culpa tras matar por primera vez a una persona. Verónica reacciona con absoluta frialdad ante la noticia de la muerte de Prudencia. Ricardo consuela a Patricia por su pérdida. Maximiliano y Valentina tienen un encuentro íntimo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro besa a Verónica y le confiesa que lo hace para recordar a Gabriela, ella reacciona fríamente. La señora Dantés se encuentra a David en el cementerio y escucha todo el amor que le profesa a su abuelo. Aníbal quiere acabar con Gertrudis.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Enemies are made when one team steals another team's taxi in Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams take a leap of faith when choosing which detour challenge to take on. And, a split-second decision may make or break one team's life.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams must drum up enough strength for an intense head-to-head battle before checking into the mat.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Teams travel to Switzerland where they free-fall over 400 feet into the Gletscherschlucht Glacier Gorge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack – whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons – the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Daryl persiguen a los captores de Beth por una Atlanta devastada, pero su auto se queda sin gasolina y deben pasar la noche en un refugio para mujeres.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Noah regresan a la iglesia para pedirles ayuda a sus compañeros. Rick y otros integrantes del grupo van a Atlanta con la intención de secuestrar a varios policías para intercambiarlos por Beth y Carol.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick busca una salida pacífica al conflicto, pero sus enemigos la rechazan y prefieren zanjar las cosas de forma violenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Para cumplir con la promesa que Beth le hizo Noah antes de morir, el grupo se dirige al barrio de Noah, esperando hallar allí protección y a otros supervivientes. Sin embargo, Rick y los suyos no quieren hacerse demasiadas esperanzas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El vehículo se avería y el grupo continúa a pie hacia Washington D. C., pero les sorprende una tormenta y buscan cobijo en un granero, donde encuentran algo totalmente inesperado e inquietante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aarón invita al grupo a Alejandría, su comunidad, un lugar que, según él, es seguro y amigable. Rick, incapaz de olvidar Woodbury y Terminus, desconfía de Aarón, pero Michonne quiere darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los integrantes del grupo tienen entrevistas con Deanna, la jefa de Alejandría, y esperan en las casas que les asignan a saber si son aceptados o rechazados. Cuando conocen a los habitantes de la comunidad, perciben que no están bien entrenados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol le sugiere a Rick que deben asesinar a Pete porque es violento con su esposa e hijo. Por otra parte, Gabriel advierte a Deanna que desconfíe del grupo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Deanna y Rick se culpan mutuamente de las muertes de Aidenn y Noah. Rick le ofrece a Jessie protección ante Pete, pero este lo descubre y se enzarza en una pelea con él. La tensión en Alexandria aumenta y algo terrible se avecina.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Deanna quiere expulsar al grupo de Rick de Alejandría y ellos se preparan para defenderse. Sin embargo, la llegada de una banda de asaltantes y la irrupción de una horda de zombis interrumpen el enfrentamiento entre los dos bandos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps make a home accessible for a homeowner in a wheelchair. Later, Tom and Kevin rebuild a dangerous staircase for a survivor of the Boston Marathon bombing.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Scott replaces outdated fluorescent undercabinet lights. Roger and Kevin demonstrate how to work with concrete. Richard teaches Tom about energy savings of temperature setbacks on thermostats.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger heads to Florida to learn about Citrus Greening, a disease that's killing citrus trees. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Tom replaces an old vinyl peel-and-stick floor with ceramic tile.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger educates Kevin on beneficial insects. Tom resizes a front door that gets stuck on the carpet every time it opens. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard repairs an outdoor garden faucet.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and Richard tour Lake Mead. Roger replaces a water-guzzling lawn. Meteorologist Jim Cantore shares cautionary tales from the front lines of drought. And Richard replaces an old-fashioned toilet.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom repairs some structural problems in a home. Scott helps run wiring for a new switch and ceiling fixture. The guys ask, "What is it?" and Roger follows up on an insect problem.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard installs a natural gas line for a new grill. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Roger shares tips on what grows best in the shade. Tom helps a homeowner hang a heavy, decorative mirror on masonry.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger learns from a beekeeper how to set up a beehive for a homeowner. The guys ask, "What is it?" and Scott adds lighting to a dark kitchen without having to run any new wiring.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger follows up with a beekeeper regarding honey harvesting. Then, Kevin, along with Roger, Richard, and Tom ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Electrician Scott Caron adds outlets to a homeowner's home.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Scott connects a homeowner's basement lighting system to one switch. Richard shares tips on air conditioning maintenance. The guys ask "What Is It?" And Roger shows how to rejuvenate a crabapple tree.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom replaces a broken window with a safer solution. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard shows how to rotate a toilet. Roger teaches Kevin how to properly sharpen a chainsaw blade.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin build a watertight fire pit cover. Then Scott shows the evolution of fuses. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard heads to Missouri to upgrade and vent a bathroom sink.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger replaces overgrown shrubs with an edible landscape. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard shares some tips on snaking drains. Tom helps a homeowner replace some damaged pieces of vinyl siding.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.desc: Warming temperatures are causing overflows all over the ice road, and with water rushing through cracks in the ice, hauling loads just got a lot more dangerous. Jody and Brett take on the challenge of removing the 66-ton derrick from the Langley site.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
